chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Charity

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِنَّ اَللَّهَ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ لَيَدْفَعُ بِالصَّدَقَةِ اَلدَّاءَ وَ اَلدُّبَيْلَةَ وَ اَلْحَرَقَ وَ اَلْغَرَقَ وَ اَلْهَدْمَ وَ اَلْجُنُونَ وَ عَدَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ سَبْعِينَ بَاباً مِنَ اَلشَّرِّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1734 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), there is no deity but Him, wards off through charity diseases, abscesses, burning, drowning, collapse, madness, and He (sw) peace be upon him, enumerated seventy types of evil."
